llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Transport Management (Executive)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: O bjectives of the Position: Responsible for ensuring transport management for inbound or outbound (as assigned) are as per stipulated guidelines, procedures and requirements Support process improvement, knowledge and risk management as per overseas delivery services M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Outbound Processing transports for packaged deliveries with a focus on sea freight to our customers in compliance with the required customer deadlines at cost-optimal conditions Managing the loading planning consolidation/deconsolidation activities at the associated companies and external locations or sites, including monitoring of loading times. Legal, internal, safety-relevant and packaging-related regulations must be considered, and customer-specific service levels and other quality requirements must be met Monitoring of all necessary or relevant shipment milestones and ensuring prompt follow ups, updates and correspondences to all relevant stakeholders. Monitoring and assessing the quality of our service providers, transport reliability and feedback rates and tracking shipments vessels Preparation of all necessary transport documents, control of the proper filing of documents, in particular freight accounting bases, and examination of additional costs incurred Inbound Processing transport for packaged deliveries with a focus on sea freight to our sites within EMEA Managing the loading planning consolidation/deconsolidation activities at the associated companies and external locations or sites, including monitoring of loading times. Legal, internal, safety-relevant and packaging-related regulations must be considered, and site-specific service levels and other quality requirements must be met Monitoring of all necessary or relevant shipment milestones and ensuring prompt follow ups, updates and correspondences to all relevant stakeholders. Monitoring and assessing the quality of our service providers, transport reliability and feedback rates, and tracking shipments vessels Preparation and monitoring of all necessary transport documents (e.g verifying draft documents), control of the proper filing of documents, in particular freight accounting bases, and examination of additional costs incurred Job Requirements: Edu c a t i o n: Fresh graduates from programs such as Transport Management, IT, Business Studies, or other relevant fields who are interested in exploring a career in supply chain. W o r k in g Experience: 1-2 years in logistics...
